scripts.install:all: npm --prefix backend install && npm --prefix user-app install && npm --prefix worker-app install && npm --prefix admin-panel install
scripts.dev: concurrently -n backend,user,worker,admin -c yellow,cyan,magenta,green "npm --prefix backend run dev" "npm --prefix user-app run dev" "npm --prefix worker-app run dev" "npm --prefix admin-panel run dev"
scripts.test:all: npm run test:unit && npm run test:e2e
